Giovanni Domenico Tiepolo

17 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Lion, Lioness and Cubs
by Giovanni Domenico Tiepolo
Italy · 1747–1804 · Pen and brown ink
Cupid Blindfolded and Two Doves
by Giovanni Domenico Tiepolo
Italy, 18th century · 1757 or after · pen and brown ink and brush and brown wash; framing lines in brown ink
Angelica Bound and about to be Devoured by the Sea Monster
by Giovanni Domenico Tiepolo
Italy · 1757–1804 · Etching on paper
Head of a Philosopher
by Giovanni Domenico Tiepolo
Italy · 18th Century · 1758–1764 · Oil on canvas
God the Father with Symbol of the Trinity
by Giovanni Domenico Tiepolo
Italy, 18th century · 1758 or after · pen and brown ink and brush and brown wash over traces of black chalk; traces of framing lines in silver paint
Satyr Surprising a Satyress
by Giovanni Domenico Tiepolo
Italy · 1759–1791 · Pen and brown and black ink
Punchinello Chopping Logs, from the series Divertimento per li regazzi (Entertainment for Children)
by Giovanni Domenico Tiepolo
Italy · 1780–1804 · Pen and brown ink and brush and brown wash
The Disrobing of Christ
by Giovanni Domenico Tiepolo
Italy, Venice · c. 1785–90 · pen and brown and black ink, brush and black, brown, and red-brown wash, over black chalk; framing lines in pen and brown ink
Peasants with a Farm-cart
by Giovanni Domenico Tiepolo
Italy, 18th century · c. 1790 · pen and brown ink and brush and brown wash over black chalk; framing lines in brown ink over black chalk
The Woman with a Tambourine
by Giovanni Domenico Tiepolo
Italy, 18th century · 1790s · pen and brown ink and brush and brown wash, over black chalk; framing lines in pen and brown ink over graphite
The Trial
by Giovanni Domenico Tiepolo
Italy, 18th century · 1790s · pen and brown ink and brush and brown wash, with black chalk; framing lines in brown ink over graphite
The Cattle Vendor
by Giovanni Domenico Tiepolo
Italy, 18th century · 1790s · pen and brown ink and brush and brown wash, over black chalk; framing lines in brown ink and graphite
Punchinello Arrested
by Giovanni Domenico Tiepolo
Italy, 18th century · 1790s · pen and brown ink and brush and brown wash, with black chalk; framing lines in brown ink over graphite
Sheep and Cows
by Giovanni Domenico Tiepolo
Italy, 18th century · 1790s · pen and brown ink and brush and brown wash, over black chalk; framing lines in brown ink and graphite
Gathering Wood
by Giovanni Domenico Tiepolo
Italy, 18th century · late 1790s · pen and brown ink and brush and brown wash over black chalk; framing lines in brown ink and graphite
A Spring Shower
by Giovanni Domenico Tiepolo
Italy, Venice · 1797–1804 · pen and brown ink and brush and brown wash over black chalk; framing lines in brown ink over graphite on antique laid paper
The Game of Bowls
by Giovanni Domenico Tiepolo
Italy, 18th century · 1797–1804 · pen and brown ink and brush and brown wash, over traces of black chalk; framing lines in brown ink over graphite on antique laid paper
